articles.title: Senate Democrats are trying to ‘codify’ Anthropic’s red lines on autonomous weapons and mass surveillance

Adam Schiff (D-CA) is working on a new bill to "codify" Anthropic's red lines and ensure humans make the ultimate decisions in questions of life and death, and Sen. articles.title: OpenAI Enters Its Focus Era by Killing Sora
articles.description: As the ChatGPT-maker eyes an IPO, it's ditching Sora in favor of a unified AI assistant and enterprise coding tools.

articles.title: Granola raises $125M, hits $1.5B valuation as it expands from meeting notetaker to enterprise AI app
articles.description: Granola's valuation jumped from $250 million to $1.5 billion with this round, and it has added more support for AI agents after users previously complained.

articles.title: Meta launches new initiative to support entrepreneurship, drive AI adoption
articles.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg said in a memo to staff that small businesses have always been a big part of the company's business model, and that while tens of millions of entrepreneurs already use its platforms to grow and connect with customers, the company wants to do more in the space.

articles.title: Mark Zuckerberg and Jensen Huang are part of Trump’s new ‘tech panel’
articles.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg, Oracle CEO Larry Ellison, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang, and Google cofounder Sergey Brin will be the first four members of the President's Council of Advisors on Science and Technology (PCAST), according to the Wall Street Journal. articles.title: Meta turns to AI to make shopping easier on Instagram and Facebook
articles.description: Meta is using generative AI to provide more product and brand information to consumers when they're shopping in its apps.

articles.title: Semicon China: AI, advanced packaging set to drive country’s chip industry growth
articles.description: Agentic artificial intelligence and advanced packaging technology will be key growth drivers for China’s chip industry in coming years, as the country is expected to increase its share of chipmaking capacity to nearly half of the world’s total by 2028. articles.title: New Bernie Sanders AI Safety Bill Would Halt Data Center Construction
articles.description: The US senator said on Tuesday that a moratorium would give lawmakers time to "ensure that AI is safe." Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez will introduce a similar bill in the House in the weeks ahead.

articles.title: Wristband enables wearers to control a robotic hand with their own movements
articles.description: By moving their hands and fingers, users can direct a robot to play piano or shoot a basketball, or they can manipulate objects in a virtual environment.

articles.title: Student use of AI for homework rises as concerns grow about critical thinking skills
articles.description: Student use of AI for homework increased in 2025, even as more students are worried the technology may be harming their ability to think critically, according to a new RAND report.
